info.title: Canto PIM
info.description:
[Canto APIs](https://api.canto.com) enable seamless synchronization between the PIM + DAM and external systems that rely on accurate, up-to-date product content. The API outlined here provides programmatic access to Canto’s Product Hub (PIM). The Product Hub API allows authorized systems to create, retrieve, update, and manage rich product data for use across digital channels, e-commerce platforms, and other target or source systems. Key Capabilities
The Canto Product Hub API enables full product data management: 1. Product Record Management: Create, read, update, and delete product entries including structured metadata, taxonomy, categories, and references. 2. Attribute & Schema Configuration: Access and manage custom product attributes and classification structures 3. Webhooks: Trigger updates or publish product datasets to downstream systems and integration pipelines. API Design - The PIM API adheres to RESTful principles, supporting standard HTTP methods (GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE). - JSON is the default payload format for both requests and responses. HTTP Status Code Conventions
Below are general HTTP codes applicable across most endpoints:
- 200, 201, 204 – Successful operations (retrieval, creation, update, deletion). - 400 – Bad request. Input payloads did not conform to the expected schema or required parameters were missing. - 401 / 403 – Authentication or authorization failed. - 404 – The route or resource was not found. - 409 – Conflict in resource state (e.g., duplicate product identifier). - 429 - Too many requests. See Rate Limits below. - 500 – An unexpected server error occurred. - 502 / 503 / 504 – Infrastructure issues such as load balancer, service unavailability, or timeouts. API Rate Limits
Rate limits are how many API calls you can make in a given time frame. If your call exceeds the pre-defined rate limit, you will run into a “429” http error-code. After which, you will need to wait until you can make another API call. PIM API Rate Limit: 5 requests/second

tags.name: import_settings
tags.description:
API endpoints for configuring how CSV imports should be processed.
        This includes:
        - Mapping CSV headers to product attributes
        - Configuring how product variations should be handled
        - Setting up category and type assignments

tags.name: imports
tags.description:
API endpoint for importing products from a CSV file.
          Supports multipart form data uploads with import configuration.

tags.name: product_channel_templates
tags.description: Product Channel Templates define the structure and configuration for importing and exporting product data into and out of Canto PIM.

tags.name: product_channel_template_products
tags.description: Manage products associated with product channel templates.

tags.name: bulk_products_channel_templates
tags.description:
Perform bulk products operation on a Product Channel Template
  
These endpoints allow you to add or remove products  that are associated with a specific channel template in bulk.

tags.name: bulk_products_catalogs
tags.description:
Perform bulk products operation on a Product Catalog
  
These endpoints allow you to add or remove products  that are associated with a specific product catalog in bulk.

tags.name: product_share_links
tags.description:
Product Share Links allow you to create shareable links for products that can be accessed
outside the PIM system. These links can have custom names and optionally expire.

tags.name: webhooks
tags.description:
Webhooks are used to notify your application when certain events occur within the system.
They can be configured to send a POST request to a specified URL when a specific event happens.
Available resources and the events they support:
- product
  - created
  - updated
  - deleted
- variant
  - created
  - updated
  - deleted
- import
  - started
  - completed
  - failed

You can validate the payload using the +X-Webhook-Signature+ header. It's a SHA256 hash of the payload, signed with the secret key.

tags.name: filter
tags.description:
API endpoints for filtering product attributes.
            Allows filtering and retrieving product attributes based on various criteria including:
            - Exact value matches
            - Partial text matches
            - Multiple value matches
            - Negative matches
            - Product type filtering
            - Product channel template filtering

post.summary: Configure import mappings and variation formats
post.description:
Creates or retrieves channel template and format settings based on provided mappings.

    This endpoint helps configure how CSV data will be imported by:
    1. Mapping CSV headers to product attributes
    2. Defining how variations should be grouped
    3. Specifying dimension and option columns

    Returns IDs needed for the actual import process.

custom_attribute_mappings[header_name].description: Key is CSV header, value is product custom attribute ID

variation_formatting[group_by][child_key.description: Column header for child SKU reference

custom_attribute_mappings[header_name].description: Key is CSV header, value is product custom attribute ID

variation_formatting[group_by][child_key.description: Column header for child SKU reference

200.description: Template and format IDs for use in import

channel_template_id.description: ID of the configured channel template

404.description: Template or format not found

422.description: Invalid mapping configuration

post.description:
Creates a new product import job from a CSV file.

        The CSV file should be uploaded as multipart form data along with
        the channel template and channel format IDs for processing the import.

file.description: The CSV file to import (multipart form data)

channel_template_id.description: Channel template ID that contains the custom attribute mappings

channel_format_id.description: Channel format ID that contains the variation format settings

product_type_id.description: Product type ID to assign to imported products

product_category_id.description: Product category ID to assign to imported products

product_category_header.description: Product category header in CSV to use to dynamically assign the product category (max 255 chars)

product_category_id_header.description: Product category ID header in CSV to use to dynamically assign the product category (max 255 chars)

active.description: Whether webhook is actively sending or disabled
